title: baby biomes
body:
# It's funny as hell
it looks so dumb when i tested it i laughed so hard

# If you're a builder it gives a small advantage
because you'll have to explore less for some blocks
altho you won't ever find good terrain to build on without having to terraform

# Other stuff
it's like they're about 20 blocks big I think. based on very science
Doesn't change how biomes generate next to eachother so a desert still can't spawn next to a tundra. I think.
